methodology.name: LLM Border Threat Taxonomy
methodology.description: OpenRouter free routing chooses the final country attribution and canonical threat category for each headline.

regional_summary_6h.headline: Iran maritime seizure and Gulf strikes rattle truce as Georgia faces deepening political instability
bullets: Iran seized an oil tanker in the Sea of Oman while the US-Iran truce was shaken by fire and Iranian strikes intercepted by the UAE.
Georgia sentenced four detainees from the October 'peaceful revolution' to lengthy prison terms amid ongoing political instability.
The U.S. Deputy Assistant Secretary and NATO Special Representative Kevin Hamilton held separate meetings with Georgian Dream officials and opposition figures in Tbilisi.
regional_summary_6h.watch: Monitor Iranian force activity in the Sea of Oman for spillover effects toward regional maritime security.
